mapper.select: SELECT gr.record_id AS recordId, gr.student_id AS studentId, stu.real_name AS studentName, stu.username AS studentNo, gr.teacher_id AS teacherId, tea.real_name AS teacherName, gr.topic_id AS topicId, t.topic_title AS topicTitle, gr.guidance_type AS guidanceType, CASE gr.guidance_type WHEN 1 THEN '项目指导' WHEN 2 THEN '论文指导' ELSE '未知' END AS guidanceTypeDesc, DATE_FORMAT(gr.guidance_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS guidanceDate, gr.guidance_content AS guidanceContent, gr.guidance_method AS guidanceMethod, gr.duration_hours AS durationHours, DATE_FORMAT(gr.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createTime, DATE_FORMAT(gr.update_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS updateTime FROM guidance_record gr LEFT JOIN user_info stu ON gr.student_id = stu.user_id LEFT JOIN user_info tea ON gr.teacher_id = tea.user_id LEFT JOIN topic_info t ON gr.topic_id = t.topic_id WHERE gr.record_id = #{recordId} AND gr.deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM guidance_record gr INNER JOIN topic_info t ON gr.topic_id = t.topic_id WHERE t.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} AND gr.deleted = 0
